name: a7_secret_kernel
outcome_goal: Only adapters/keychain.py reads API_KEY/SECRET/TOKEN environment values directly; every other callsite routes through resolve_secret(name, *, scope).
verify_command: bash -lc "bad=$(rg 'os\.environ\.get\(.*(API_KEY|SECRET|TOKEN)' 'Code&DBs/Workflow' --type py -l | rg -v 'Code&DBs/Workflow/adapters/keychain.py' || true); test -z \"$bad\" && PYTHONPATH='Code&DBs/Workflow' /opt/homebrew/bin/python3 -m pytest --noconftest -q 'Code&DBs/Workflow/tests/integration/test_secret_kernel.py'"

jobs.label: a7_secret_kernel
jobs.prompt: On branch praxis/kernel-secret, consolidate the secret kernel. Touched files: Code&DBs/Workflow/adapters/credentials.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/registry/provider_execution_registry.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/runtime/integrations/connector_executor.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/runtime/workflow/execution_backends.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/adapters/keychain.py. Export resolve_secret(name, *, scope) from keychain.py and route every non-keychain credential environment read through it. Do not add shims. File operator_decisions key decision.2026-04-20.kernel-secret-consolidation and open a PR to public referencing it. Transport constraint: use admitted CLI transport only; do not use llm_task, HTTP API routes, Anthropic routes, or deprecated Claude 4.6 slugs.
jobs.verify_command: bash -lc "bad=$(rg 'os\.environ\.get\(.*(API_KEY|SECRET|TOKEN)' 'Code&DBs/Workflow' --type py -l | rg -v 'Code&DBs/Workflow/adapters/keychain.py' || true); test -z \"$bad\" && PYTHONPATH='Code&DBs/Workflow' /opt/homebrew/bin/python3 -m pytest --noconftest -q 'Code&DBs/Workflow/tests/integration/test_secret_kernel.py'"
